hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves Boutique
Concierge Care
hero.subheadline: Carlos and Beatriz Grau built Acquality on one belief: every pool owner deserves white-glove attention, honest communication, and crystal-clear water. Get detailed reports after every visit so you always know exactly what was done.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Boutique Pool Care Tailored<br class="hidden md:block"> to Your Miami Home
services.subtitle: From weekly concierge maintenance to full outdoor transformations, the Grau family delivers personalized service you can feel in every sparkling detail.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Concierge
cards.description: Skimming, vacuuming, brushing, filter cleaning, and full chemical testing. You receive a detailed email report after every visit with water quality readings and services performed.

cards.title: Repair & Remodel
cards.description: Variable-speed pump upgrades, salt chlorine generators, Jandy system repairs, and full pool remodels. We diagnose fast and fix it right the first time.

cards.title: Green Pool Recovery
cards.description: Expert algaecide selection for every algae type combined with shock treatments. We restore neglected or storm-damaged pools to crystal-clear condition.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Balancing
cards.description: Comprehensive testing and balancing of alkalinity, cyanuric acid, calcium hardness, and pH levels to keep your water safe, clear, and gentle on skin.

cards.title: Acid Wash & Deep Clean
cards.description: Post-hurricane recovery, stubborn stain removal, and deep surface cleaning that restores neglected pool surfaces to like-new condition.

cards.title: Outdoor Living Solutions
cards.description: Artificial turf installation, audiovisual setups, pergolas, pressure washing, and exterior window cleaning to complete your backyard oasis.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Concierge Pool Care

steps.title: Book Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we will schedule a no-obligation on-site assessment. Carlos personally evaluates every new pool to create a custom care plan.

steps.title: We Handle Every Detail
steps.description: Our CPO-certified technicians arrive on schedule, perform thorough service, and send you a detailed email report with water chemistry readings and photos.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays pristine, swim-ready, and worry-free week after week. If anything is ever less than perfect, we come back and make it right at no charge.

about.label: Why Miami Families Trust Us
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Care, Dignity, and Respect
about.description: Founded in 2014 by husband and wife team Carlos and Beatriz Grau, Acquality Pool Service brings a boutique concierge approach to residential pool care in the greater Miami area. With over 20 years of combined experience and CPO certification, we treat every client like family. Carlos manages operations and supervises every technician. Beatriz ensures your experience is seamless from first call to every visit after.

features.title: Detailed Reports After Every Visit
features.description: You receive an email after each service with water quality readings, chemical adjustments, and a summary of all work performed. No guessing, ever.

features.title: Bilingual, Family-Owned Service
features.description: Carlos and Beatriz serve Miami's diverse community in both English and Spanish, bringing personal attention that big companies simply cannot match.

features.title: BBB A+ Rating, 5-Star Reviews
features.description: Accredited by the Better Business Bureau with an A+ rating and perfect 5-star reviews across Google, Facebook, HomeAdvisor, and Yelp.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Boutique Service.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is unique, so we provide custom quotes after a free on-site assessment. No hidden fees, no surprise charges.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will return to make it right at no additional charge. We built this business on trust, and we stand behind every visit with the same care we would give our own family pool.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within one week of their free assessment. For green pool emergencies or post-hurricane recovery, we offer expedited same-day or next-day response throughout the Miami area.

faqs.question: What is included in the email report after each visit?
faqs.answer: Every report includes water chemistry readings (pH, chlorine, alkalinity, cyanuric acid, calcium hardness), a summary of all services performed, any recommendations for repairs or adjustments, and photos when relevant.

faqs.question: Do you service salt chlorine pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are salt pool and saline specialists. We install, maintain, and repair salt chlorine generator systems and understand the unique chemistry requirements of saltwater pools.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate or backyard access and we handle everything while you are away. Your detailed email report after each visit ensures you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Do you offer service in Spanish?
faqs.answer: Yes. Acquality Pool Service is fully bilingual. Beatriz and our team provide seamless service in both English and Spanish, ensuring clear communication with every client.

testimonials.name: Patricia R.
testimonials.text: They are personable, punctual, knowledgeable and offer a great service for a great price. They are also bilingual. If you want your pool water crystal-clear, I highly recommend their service!

testimonials.name: Pablo S.
testimonials.text: Acquality has done a great job servicing my pool for over 5 years. I am very happy with their high-quality customer service and intend to continue working with them for the foreseeable future.

testimonials.name: Karen R.
testimonials.text: My home pool is used daily by Airbnb guests. I am very impressed by the quality of service they provide. The pool is always crystal clear no matter how many guests use it.
